Bash(source /juice5b/scr5b/kaitwang/cs234/RLinf/.venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import h5py
for i in range\(3\):
    f = h5py.File\(f'/afs/cs.stanford.edu/u/kaitwang/.maniskill/demos/PickCube-v1/motionplanning/trajectory.rgb.pd_ee_delta_pose.physx_cpu.{i}.h5', 'r'\)
    trajs = [k for k in f.keys\(\) if k.startswith\('traj_'\)]
    actions = f[trajs[0]]['actions']
    print\(f'shard {i}: {len\(trajs\)} episodes, action shape: {actions.shape}'\)
    f.close\(\)
")
